items.name_en: 🔥Balloon New Large Canvas Bucket Bag 👜 It looks like a bucket bag on the outside, using strong calf leather for the round bottom, and napa soft cowhide for the bag body. The leather is super comfortable and delicate and soft, making its outline round like a balloon 🎈. A Loewe 💎 Anagram dice 🎲 is a highlight on the knotted leather cord ✨. Structured yet relaxed drawstring bag, using an intriguing structure to achieve a classic proportion and clean lining silhouette 🤎. A rigid external base supports the soft inner pouch 🎀, ensuring a sturdy design 🥰 that holds the soft bag body comfortably. Lightweight and comfortable to wear. This version is made of palm fiber and cowhide *Adjustable shoulder strap 🧸. Buckle closure. Crossbody or handbag carry, multiple ways to wear *Stylish, youthful and versatile 💐
items.name_cn:
🔥Balloon New Large Canvas Bucket Bag 👜 It looks like a bucket bag on the outside, using strong calf leather for the round bottom, and napa soft cowhide for the bag body. The leather is super comfortable and delicate and soft, making its outline round like a balloon 🎈. A Loewe 💎 Anagram dice 🎲 is a highlight on the knotted leather cord ✨. Structured yet relaxed drawstring bag, using an intriguing structure to achieve a classic proportion and clean lining silhouette 🤎. A rigid external base supports the soft inner pouch 🎀, ensuring a sturdy design 🥰 that holds the soft bag body comfortably. Lightweight and comfortable to wear. This version is made of palm fiber and cowhide *Adjustable shoulder strap 🧸. Buckle closure. Crossbody or handbag carry, multiple ways to wear *Stylish, youthful and versatile 💐
Size: 31cm~21.5cm~16cm
Model: 9082
Color: Beige Canvas Brown

items.name_en: 🔥Bestseller🔥Small rattan and leather square Basket bag🌹This compact square Basket bag is handwoven from raffia and made of leather; simple and elegant🌼Lightweight, simple style with depth💥Korean style feel with this bag; perfect for travel and photos💄Adjustable strap length, great for outings or commuting👜Easy to match, looks refreshing👑The Square basket is an essential beach vacation bag🌷A casual bag is a must; this bag fits a water bottle⭐️And even a small umbrella. Simple design with the L0💋EWE logo, suitable for any age💥Material: Plant-based material (natural raffia)Size: 27~20~10CM

items.name_en: 🔥Every year Luo releases a unique white canvas bag 💄and it's always very popular. The year before last there was the Toast bag, last year the Paula's bag, and this year we welcome the latest Cushion Tote bag~~Simply amazing! ✅👻❤️Featuring exclusive custom Taiwan-imported canvas paired with imported calfskin 💥A drawstring-style opening with knotted cords at the four corners, and an internal fixed "support" structure to maintain shape. The style is very novel and unique 💋adding practicality to the casual open-top bag. 👍👍👍A solid choice for vacation and commuting~💯
items.name_cn:

The style is very novel and unique 💋adding practicality to the casual open-top bag. 👍👍👍A solid choice for vacation and commuting~💯
Size: 32CM~26CM~16CM
Style No.: 8015
Color: Canvas Brown

items.name_en: 🔥High quality from the counter🔥 Prada《PRADA》 Upgraded Saffiano Cross-grain Calfskin 🎉Tote Bag🎉 1BA358 New from the counter🎉🎉 Made of Saffiano calfskin, the bag features dual top handles and a detachable shoulder strap for versatile carrying (95cm), very functional 😘 The body is embellished with an engraved logo, which can also be detached and used as an accessory on other bags or clothing, so beautiful 😘 Simple yet stylish and atmospheric, worth owning 😘 Hurry up and get one 👏👏 Length 17 x Height 19 x Base 6cm 🎉🎉🎉 👏👏👏
